name: Session Boot / Agent Runtime Boot
role: Connects a new chat to the system, creates runtime-state, triggers checkpoint, writes lower-contour boot trace.

name: Live Context Update
role: Keeps current working context alive between snapshots.

name: Weekly Field Report
role: Builds weekly delta picture from daily, trace, learning, decisions and errors.

name: System Assembly
role: Links Trace, Learning, Decisions, Source Map, Core and processes.

name: Learning Capture
role: Turns errors and user corrections into reusable system learning.

name: Route / Source Map Maintenance
role: Keeps routing and source maps aligned with system reality.

name: System Error Audit
role: Audits route breaks, failed checkpoints and source conflicts.

name: System Fixation Control
role: Controls whether system writes match actual system state.
